letters.label: Letter One
variants:
Day One. Loadout.

Iron sword, x2 (one back-up per the notebook).
Bow, 64 arrows.
Enchanted leather, full set, Protection I.
Ender pearls, x16.
Bed, x1.
Raw potatoes, x32.

The notebook calls for gold apples. The town had none. I will source them en route.

The rat is real. I have logged him.

Day One.

- S. Marra

Day One. Loadout.

Iron sword, x2.
Bow, 64 arrows.
Enchanted leather, Prot I.
Ender pearls, x16.
Bed.
Potatoes, x32.

The notebook says gold apples are non-negotiable. The town had none. I left before anyone noticed I was gone.

A rat in a vest gave me this paper. He looked sad. I do not know what to log him as.

I am ready.

- Soll Marra

letters.label: Letter Two
variants:
The notebook is Halric's. He started it twenty-six years ago, the year before he met me.

Specs for the End. Pillar heights. Crystal cages. Cage break order. Bed-blast yields. Pearl trajectories.

He never went.

He died in spring. Lung-thing. The notebook calls it "cessation, non-combat."

The dragon never met Halric.

I am bringing it to her.

- S. Marra

The notebook is Halric's. He started writing it the year before I was born. Twenty-six years of specs and no dragon at the end.

Pillar heights. Crystal cages. Cage break order. Bed-blast yields. Pearl trajectories. The whole fight, on paper.

He died in spring. The notebook calls it "cessation, non-combat." I think it was his lungs. He coughed a lot. He never said the word.

The dragon never met Halric.

I am bringing him to her.

- Soll
